head.title: IXL | Math, Language Arts, Science, Social Studies, and Spanish

meta.name: description
meta.content: IXL is the world's most popular subscription-based learning site for K-12. Used by over 18 million students, IXL provides personalized learning in more than 17,000 topics, covering math, language arts, science, social studies, and Spanish. Interactive questions, awards, and certificates keep kids motivated as they master skills.
IXL | Math, Language Arts, Science, Social Studies, and Spanish

IXL is the world's most popular subscription-based learning site for K-12. Used by over 18 million students, IXL provides personalized learning in more than 17,000 topics, covering math, language arts, science, social studies, and Spanish. Interactive questions, awards, and certificates keep kids motivated as they master skills.

main.p: Personalized practice for math, language arts, science, social studies, and Spanish.

section.p: IXL is a learning platform focused on skills practice, targeted review, and steady progress tracking for students. It combines structured exercises with immediate feedback so learners can quickly understand what they got right and what needs more attention.

Subjects are organized by grade level and topic, making it easier for families and teachers to choose material that matches current goals. Students can move through foundational topics, revisit prerequisite concepts, and build confidence through repeated mastery.

Each activity gives instant correction details and short explanations so mistakes become learning moments. Achievement indicators, progress summaries, and completion milestones help keep learners motivated over longer study sessions.

Teachers can use assignment tools and performance views to spot patterns, while parents can monitor growth at home through progress reports. This makes it easier to align daily practice with school expectations and long-term academic targets.

IXL includes broad coverage across math, language arts, science, social studies, and Spanish, with content that spans early learning through advanced school years. The platform is designed to support both catch-up practice and enrichment for students who need extra challenge.
